description_long: This is a modern, tactical shotgun with a predominantly blue and black color scheme, featuring a robust polymer and metal construction. The body is angular with a ventilated upper handguard, hexagonal cutouts, and a prominent barrel extending from the top. The shotgun is equipped with a pistol grip and a short, squared stock, suggesting a compact design for urban use. A visible magazine protrudes from the lower receiver, indicating a magazine-fed action. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Additional details include a cylindrical attachment under the barrel, likely a flashlight or laser module, and a sleek, matte finish throughout.
description: A compact, blue and black tactical shotgun with a ventilated handguard, pistol grip, and magazine-fed design. Features a robust, modern build with a matte finish and visible under-barrel attachment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ventilated handguard, pistol grip, magazine, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the shotgun and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear edge-on view, emphasizing the compactness and straight alignment of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ventilated handguard and visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space
